People have a right to spend their
holidays where they see fit and in the
manner they see fit. If the good
German and his family want to go to
Hiawatha and drink beer in the shade
of the trees, they have a perfect
right to do SO, and the light and
power monopoly of Spokane has no
right to force him to go anywhere
else because of street car service,
manipulated to produce that result


Thousands preferred to spend their
Fourth and their money with the
Washington Water Power company
at Natatorium and they were en-
titled to the opportunity and good
service to and from the park


But there were about 1000 citizens
of Spokane who chose to spend their
holiday with the Hieber Brewing
company at Hiawatha, who could not
get out there and probably twice that
number who got there and could not
